rules.headings: font-sans (Montserrat), font-bold or font-black, tracking-tight. Use text-[#0B1D33] for strong contrast.

grid_strategy.services: Bento Grid style. Mix of col-span-1 and col-span-2 tiles to avoid boring uniformity. Gap-6 or gap-8.
grid_strategy.gallery: Responsive grid for images (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with tab filters above.

surface_styles.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90, 1px border-b border-gray-100. Must be sticky z-50.
surface_styles.cards: Neumorphism Light: bg-[#FFFFFF] or bg-[#F8F9FA], shadow-sm, 1px border border-gray-100. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-[#2ECC71]/30, transition-all 0.3s ease.
surface_styles.mobile_cta_container: Solid bg-white, border-t border-gray-200, p-4 fixed bottom-0 w-full z-40 (Mobile only).

navigation.rules: Desktop: Logo left, Links center, Book Now (Primary CTA) right. Mobile: Hamburger menu, links stack, sticky CTA at bottom.

hero.layout: Large headline 'From Dirty to Spotless'. Subheading below. Two CTAs side by side. Below text, a massive Before/After slider component (max-h-[70vh] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl).
hero.overlay: If using a background image, max black overlay 30% (bg-black/30).

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B1D33] text-white hover:bg-[#0B1D33]/90 rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[#2ECC71] text-white hover:bg-[#2ECC71]/90 rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-colors shadow-md shadow-[#2ECC71]/20
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E8A317] text-[#0B1D33] hover:bg-[#E8A317]/90 rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-colors

floating_whatsapp.rules: Fixed bottom-right (bottom-24 on mobile, bottom-8 on desktop). Green #2ECC71 circular button, large icon, shadow-xl, z-50, hover:scale-110 transition-transform. Phone: 9902608075.

before_after_slider.rules: Interactive component. Overlay 'Before' image on top of 'After' image with a draggable vertical divider line. Use a custom handle (bg-[#E8A317] or #FFFFFF).

forms.rules: Use Shadcn components. Input, Select, Textarea. Focus states must ring with #2ECC71 (ring-2 ring-[#2ECC71]/50).

counters.rules: Use framer-motion for counting up animations when scrolled into view. Text size large (text-4xl lg:text-5xl) in primary color #0B1D33, text-accent for the '+'.

hero_and_interiors.description: Bright modern living room - Spotless clean. Use as Hero or After image.
Clean white couch interior. Use for room showcase (Living Area).

before_after_placeholders.description: Cluttered kitchen. Use as 'Before' state in sliders.
Clean bathroom. Use as 'After' state in sliders or Bathroom showcase.
Cleaning supplies. Use for Eco-friendly or Process section.

testing_and_accessibility.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='book-now-button', data-testid='whatsapp-fab', data-testid='tab-kitchen'). Ensure contrast ratios for text on light backgrounds exceed APCA standards.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_extensions: Use .js and .jsx for all React components. Do not use .tsx or .ts.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react (Check, Star, Menu, X, Home, Sparkles, Wind, Trash2, Droplets, MapPin, Calendar, Clock, MessageSquare). For WhatsApp, use standard Lucide icon or custom SVG if needed.
instructions_to_main_agent.animation: Use framer-motion for scroll reveal, counters, and page transitions.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Marketing sections use pure Tailwind+HTML logic. Booking Form and Admin Dashboard strictly use Shadcn UI components (Card, Table, Input, Select, Button, Dialog).
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Ensure paths exist for Home, Services, About Us, Our Work (Gallery), Reviews, Contact/Book, and /admin for the dashboard.
